name: Hide from the Rain
original_name: 私がヒモを飼うなんて
overview: Sumire is a woman that's too kind and keeps falling for bad men. In the midst of heartbreak, she discovers a lingerie brand and makes up her mind to become a lingerie designer. She is determined to pursue her new dream. One rainy day, she meets Soichi and is attracted to him but he holds a secret...

trailers.title: 『私がヒモを飼うなんて』全話映像入りメインスポット公開!! 3/28(火)深夜24:58スタート!!【TBS】
